purpose: Tie the executable post-handoff signal witness to its sequence claim, proof certificate, underlying delivery chain evidence, and source-status boundaries.
positive_example: proc left init handoff routes later binary signal
boundaries: This bundle covers one post-handoff sequence after consumed proc-l-init neighbor delivery.
The underlying delivery is justified by the registered neighbor delivery recipient chain evidence bundle.
No scheduler, topology, timing, output-clearing, queued-delivery, or new command semantics are claimed.
